story.text: The **Second Person Spellbook** (“you”) — the lore that addresses the reader directly. The City of Mages is the living world where the agentprivacy architecture is *walked as story*: nine Tomes, a cast of forty-one, the workshops of its districts, and the artefacts forged within. It is kept distinctly from privacymage’s first-person grimoire — the City carries its own canon and its own IPFS pin.

## The Tomes — the Second-Person journey

Nine Tomes (Acts I–IX), addressed to *you*: from the first refusal through the Crafting, the Library, and the Horizon.

- 📖 [The Tomes](https://guide.agentprivacy.ai/view/the-tomes) — **59 acts** across Tomes I–IX.

## The City

- 🎭 [The Cast](https://guide.agentprivacy.ai/view/the-cast) — **41** keepers, personas, and witnesses (Selene · Pandia · Hermaion · Pleione · the Archivist · the Librarian · the Architect …).
- 🏛️ [The Workshops](https://guide.agentprivacy.ai/view/the-workshops) — the workshops and districts (the Threshold · Horizon · Navigation · the Tower …).
- 📐 [The Specs](https://guide.agentprivacy.ai/view/the-specs) — **12** structural specs: the attachment architecture, the vertex lattice, the protocols.
- ⚔️ [The Artefacts](https://guide.agentprivacy.ai/view/the-artefacts) — the forged blades, crystallised proofs of attention.
- 🐉 [The Bestiary](https://guide.agentprivacy.ai/view/the-bestiary) — the creatures of the City.
- 🪑 [The Invitations](https://guide.agentprivacy.ai/view/the-invitations) — the visiting mages and the Invitation Protocol.

## City lore

- 🚪 [Join the City](https://guide.agentprivacy.ai/view/lore-join-the-city) — how to enter.
- 📜 [All the Tomes — a clear list](https://guide.agentprivacy.ai/view/lore-all-the-tomes-a-clear-list).
- 🗺️ [The City Lore](https://guide.agentprivacy.ai/view/the-city-lore) — the City’s own record.
- 📰 [The Mageletters](https://guide.agentprivacy.ai/view/the-mageletters) · [The Blog](https://guide.agentprivacy.ai/view/the-blog).

---

The City uses the **cityofmages grimoire** (the *second-person* spellbook); privacymage’s grimoire v10.4 is the [first-person spellbook](https://guide.agentprivacy.ai/view/welcome-visitors). Sibling of the [agentprivacy guide](https://guide.agentprivacy.ai/view/welcome-visitors); the first-person narrative is the [Spellbooks](https://guide.agentprivacy.ai/view/welcome-visitors).
